title: antelaea azadirachta
intro: Antelaea azadirachta, also known as the neem tree, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the Indian subcontinent and other parts of Asia. The neem tree has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of neem include reducing fever and inflammation, improving skin and hair health, and aiding in the management of diabetes and various infectious diseases. Neem is often prepared as a herbal tea, oil, or powder, which can be used internally or applied topically to promote overall health and well-being.
